Home › Products › Air Dunnage Bags
Cargo Securing

Air Dunnage Bags

Air dunnage bags are inflatable cushioning systems that fill void spaces between pallets and cargo in shipping containers, rail cars, and trucks. By immobilizing loads and preventing shifting during transit, dunnage bags dramatically reduce cargo damage claims and the costs associated with replacing or repairing goods damaged in transport.

Request a Free Quote All Products
Construction
Kraft paper or woven PP outer
Working Pressure
0.3 – 0.9 bar
Inflation
Air compressor / hand pump
Sizes
Multiple — custom available
Features & Benefits

Why Choose Air Dunnage Bags?

Engineered to industry standards and built for reliability in Canadian industrial conditions.

💨
Inflates in Seconds
A standard air compressor or hand pump inflates a dunnage bag to working pressure in seconds — no special tools or training required.
📦
Locks Cargo in Place
Fills void spaces completely, pressing against adjacent cargo to immobilize loads and prevent shifting, tipping, or collision damage.
💲
Eliminates Expensive Wood Bracing
Replacing wooden blocking and bracing with air dunnage bags reduces material costs, labour time, and disposal costs per shipment.
🔄
Reusable Heavy-Duty Grades
Multi-use woven PP grade dunnage bags can be deflated, inspected, and reused across multiple shipments — improving cost per shipment.
🌿
Eco-Friendly Paper Option
Single-use paper dunnage bags are fully recyclable and biodegradable — a sustainable alternative to foam or plastic dunnage materials.
📏
Wide Range of Sizes
Available in multiple standard widths and lengths to fit every container size, rail car configuration, and truck load requirement.
Product Overview

Everything You Need to Know

Cargo damage during transit is a costly problem for manufacturers, distributors, and logistics operators. Air dunnage bags provide a simple, fast, and highly effective solution — inflatable cushions that fill gap spaces between pallets, prevent load movement, and absorb the shock and vibration forces experienced during rail, road, and sea transport.

Installation takes seconds: place the deflated bag in the void space between cargo, attach an inflation nozzle to a standard air compressor or hand pump, and inflate to the recommended working pressure. The bag fills the available space, pressing against the cargo from all sides to lock the load in place for the entire journey.

Available in a range of grades from single-use paper construction to heavy-duty multi-use woven polypropylene options, our dunnage bags are sized to accommodate standard container and rail car void dimensions.

Wholesale Packaging supplies air dunnage bags across Canada to manufacturers, freight forwarders, warehouses, and transport operators. Our specialists can help you select the correct bag grade, size, and working pressure for your cargo type and void dimensions.
